text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Owww! OUCH!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: It hurts like crazy! This is all your fault, Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...No! No way!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna be a great witch like Grandma! I won't
let something like this slow me down!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Let me train, Familiar! That's an order!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Let me train, Familiar! That's an order!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Your master is giving you an order! Do something!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to avoid a tantrum while I explain the risk of
her injury getting worse. Somehow, I manage to
convince her to rest.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Whatever! I'm not gonna move, then! I'm staying
right here!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Now, go get me some dinner, Familiar! And don't
forget dessert!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And a TV and some comics too! This is my new
home!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho is in a full-on pout, and it takes a
while for her injury to fully recover.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: All right, now you're getting it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: There's a lot to do if I'm gonna be a great witch!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: C'mon, let's hurry up and get back to training!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Owww!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: It hurts, Familiar! Do something!
choice_data_list: I think we should rest today, after all.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ngh... But then I can't be like Grandma!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I manage to settle Sweep Tosho down,
she remains in a bad mood for a while.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehe, look! I can run! This is nothing!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
This is the power of a genius magical girl! I'm
gonna be just like Grandma in no time! Just
watch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Luckily, it turns out that Sweep Tosho's injury isn't
too serious.
